rationale: Ground truth is thin (mostly LGTM/approve plus one narrow inline ask about verifying reduce_scatter behavior in test_expert_parallel_layout.py, unrelated to hunyuan_fused_moe.py); neither candidate hits that specific concern, so recall is low for both. X mostly confirms correctness with PASS checks and offers a single soft documentation nit — grounded but thin. Y produces five grounded, file/line-anchored findings including concrete missing-test-coverage gaps for early-return branches in the new DP-metadata function, which is thematically closer to the reviewer's actual concern (verification completeness) and more actionable with exact suggested test additions, though most findings are minor nits rather than blockers.
